tagline: Smoky braised beef meets island heat over cilantro-lime rice.
novelty_check: Chipotle has no fixed dish list and currently offers no Caribbean-leaning build; this leverages the smoky chipotle/cumin barbacoa as a jerk analog with corn salsa for sweetness.
confidence_reason: Jerk scored 0.77 — the highest signal on the board — with strong Williamsburg validation from Kokomo (21 local mentions across 18 reviews), and barbacoa's chipotle/cumin profile is the closest pantry match to jerk warmth.

tagline: Crispy cheese-laced tacos with slow-roasted pork and a hot red chili dip.
novelty_check: Chipotle has no quesotaco or birria-style build on menu; this uses queso blanco + jack on a crispy corn tortilla with the hot red chili salsa as a consomé-style dip stand-in.
confidence_reason: Birria's signal is modest at 0.25 but it has real local traction (4 mentions across 4 reviews near Ensenada's coastal Mexican audience) and birria-style tacos remain a viral national format.

tagline: Fire-kissed roasted veg over saffron rice with lemon-herb tahini drizzle.
novelty_check: Centers cauliflower-forward roasted veg with tahini as the hero dressing — a distinct vegetable-led build versus CAVA's typical protein-anchored bowls.
confidence_reason: Cauliflower scores 0.50 with strong local mentions (13 across 9 reviews) — Laser Wolf and K'Far have made charred cauliflower a Williamsburg Israeli signature, and tahini (0.28) reinforces it.

tagline: Caribbean heat meets North African sweet — wrapped and ready.
novelty_check: CAVA has no Caribbean-leaning pita; harissa honey chicken + skhug + sumac slaw mimics jerk's sweet-spicy-herbal profile in a portable pita format.
confidence_reason: Jerk is the #1 signal at 0.77 with 21 local mentions; harissa honey chicken's existing sweet-heat lane is the most natural pantry bridge to Kokomo-style jerk flavor.

tagline: Umami-glazed mushrooms over wild rice with sesame crunch and crispy onions.
novelty_check: Distinct from Shroomami (which uses kale/wasabi profile) and Miso Glazed Salmon — this is a wild-rice, portobello-led umami bowl with no salmon and a different base/topping architecture.
confidence_reason: Miso scores 0.52 with consistent local mentions (13 across 12 reviews) and trends nationally at 60.8; the pantry already has miso sesame ginger dressing making this operationally trivial.

tagline: Apple kimchi, KBBQ steak, and crispy rice for max texture and tang.
novelty_check: Saucy KBBQ Chicken uses chicken without kimchi as the hero; this is steak-led with apple kimchi front-and-center and a crispy-rice texture play that's not on any current menu item.
confidence_reason: Kimchi scores 0.42 with 12 local mentions across 5 reviews showing concentrated Williamsburg enthusiasm; apple kimchi is already a premium SKU so operational lift is minimal.
